_comment: Open-vocabulary cause seed list for learning-schema.json. Use one of these values in the 'cause' field, or 'other' with a snake_case cause_label for novel patterns.

known_causes.description: A requirement was present in an upstream doc (seed, PRD) but was not carried into a downstream doc (tasks, SKILL.md).
Context was present in a conversation or session but was not persisted across a skill-to-skill handoff.
A requirement was never surfaced during planning; it only became visible at implementation time.
The requirement was knowingly deferred or cut, and the learning captures that this was a mistake or should be tracked.
A schema, interface, or data contract was missing a field or constraint that should have been there.
A general engineering or process best practice was violated; not tied to a specific handoff failure.
Novel cause not covered above. Requires a non-null cause_label in snake_case. Recurring labels are candidates for promotion to named values.
